title: YOUTH SPORTS PROGRAMS - 211info
text: BEAVERTON FAMILY YMCA YOUTH SPORTS PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers recreational and competitive sports leagues. Programs vary by season. 9685 SW Harvest Court Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 644-2191 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 644-2191 Main phone Main phone (503) 644-2191 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Financial assistance may be available to participants that qualify. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 6am-10pm, Friday 6am-9pm, Saturday 7am-6pm Services: Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CHILDCARE & MORE SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
